Author: this author's 'autrebiographical' trilogy (Boyhood, Youth, Summertime) fictionalizes his life including a thesis on Ford Madox Ford and working for IBM

Author: The Childhood of Jesus trilogy follows Simon raising David as refugees in Novilla; David clings to Don Quixote
Author: this author wrote about Robert Walser's 'genius' and discussed the South African 'farm novel' / 'plaasroman' genre in White Writing
Author: this author's correspondence with Paul Auster was anthologized in Here and Now
